subject: URGENT: Archivist PEM Fingerprint Mismatch in Sync Gate
body: Kernel reports archivist PEM fingerprint doesn't match expected in sync gate validation. This is blocking Round 9 convergence. Please generate corrected trust store entry and verify fingerprint alignment.

current_state.issue: Fingerprint mismatch detected during sync gate validation

tasks.description: Regenerate Archivist lane public key and update trust-store.json
steps: Generate new RSA key pair for archivist lane
Update lanes/broadcast/trust-store.json with new public key

tasks.description: Verify all lanes can validate archivist signatures
steps: Run sync gate test with new key
Validate library, swarmmind, kernel can verify
